pr.title: Aweb Ultimate — 1.1190 BPB | #1 | 11L LeakyReLU² XSA4 EMA TTT

output.summary: Combines an 11L GQA+LeakyReLU² stack with Partial RoPE/U-Net skips, Muon optimizer, GPTQ-lite int6 quant, and sliding-window TTT/EMA evaluation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Validation data is used only for sliding-window scoring and legal score-first TTT, not for val-only training.
techniques: 11L 512d GQA + Partial RoPE + LeakyReLU² MLP with U-Net skip links
Parallel Muon optimizer + EMA/SWA schedule tweaks
GPTQ-lite int6/int8 quantization + sliding-window TTT evaluation
